name: lelon
tagline: Taiwan's Leading Aluminum Electrolytic Capacitor Manufacturer
description: Lelon Electronics is a premier Taiwanese manufacturer of aluminum electrolytic capacitors, offering high-quality products with excellent performance and competitive pricing for global markets.
longDescription: Lelon Electronics Corporation, established in 1976, is one of Taiwan's largest and most respected manufacturers of aluminum electrolytic capacitors. With decades of expertise in capacitor technology, Lelon has built a strong reputation for quality, reliability, and innovation. The company operates state-of-the-art manufacturing facilities in Taiwan and China, producing a comprehensive range of capacitors including radial lead, snap-in, SMD, and solid polymer types. Lelon's products serve diverse markets including consumer electronics, industrial equipment, automotive applications, and LED lighting. Known for their excellent cost-performance ratio, Lelon capacitors provide reliable solutions for both standard and demanding applications. The company maintains strict quality control systems and holds various international certifications including ISO 9001 and ISO 14001. As an authorized distributor, BeiLuo Electronics provides comprehensive technical support and competitive pricing for Lelon products.

coreProducts.name: Radial Lead Capacitors
coreProducts.description: High-reliability radial aluminum electrolytic capacitors for general-purpose and industrial applications

coreProducts.name: Snap-in Capacitors
coreProducts.description: High-capacitance snap-in capacitors for power supply and industrial applications

coreProducts.name: SMD Capacitors
coreProducts.description: Surface mount aluminum electrolytic capacitors for compact electronic designs

coreProducts.name: Solid Polymer Capacitors
coreProducts.description: High-performance solid polymer capacitors with ultra-low ESR and long lifetime

seoTitle: Lelon Aluminum Electrolytic Capacitors | Authorized Distributor | BeiLuo Electronics
seoDescription: Authorized distributor of Lelon aluminum electrolytic capacitors. Radial, snap-in, SMD, and solid polymer capacitors. Technical support, competitive pricing, and fast delivery.

faqs.question: What makes Lelon capacitors a good choice for my application?
faqs.answer: Lelon capacitors offer an excellent combination of quality, performance, and value. Manufactured in Taiwan with modern production facilities and strict quality control, Lelon capacitors provide reliable performance at competitive prices. The company offers a comprehensive product range including radial lead, snap-in, SMD, and solid polymer types to meet diverse application requirements. Lelon capacitors are particularly popular in consumer electronics, LED lighting, and industrial applications where cost-performance ratio is important.
faqs.decisionGuide: For cost-sensitive applications requiring reliable performance, Lelon capacitors are an excellent choice. Contact our FAE team for specific recommendations.

faqs.question: What is the quality level of Lelon capacitors compared to Japanese brands?
faqs.answer: Lelon capacitors offer quality levels that meet or exceed industry standards for most applications. While Japanese brands like Chemi-Con may offer premium series for extreme applications, Lelon capacitors provide excellent reliability and performance for standard industrial and consumer applications. The company maintains ISO 9001 and ISO 14001 certifications and uses advanced manufacturing processes. Many customers find Lelon capacitors provide the optimal balance of quality and cost for their applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: For mission-critical aerospace or military applications, consider premium Japanese brands. For industrial, consumer, and automotive applications, Lelon offers excellent quality at better value.

faqs.question: What product series does Lelon offer?
faqs.answer: Lelon offers a comprehensive range of aluminum electrolytic capacitors including: RGA/RGD series for general-purpose radial lead applications, RGH series for high-temperature applications (105°C and 125°C), LGU series for snap-in high-capacitance applications, VZH series for SMD applications, and OS-CON style solid polymer capacitors for high-frequency low-ESR applications. Each series is designed for specific application requirements with various voltage, capacitance, and temperature ratings available.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our product catalog to find the right Lelon series for your application, or contact our FAE team for selection assistance.

faqs.question: Are Lelon capacitors suitable for automotive applications?
faqs.answer: Yes, Lelon offers AEC-Q200 qualified capacitors specifically designed for automotive applications. These capacitors meet the rigorous requirements of the automotive industry including extended temperature ranges, vibration resistance, and long operational life. Lelon's automotive-grade capacitors are used in various vehicle applications including LED lighting, infotainment systems, and electronic control modules. The company provides complete PPAP documentation for automotive supplier qualification.
faqs.decisionGuide: For automotive applications, select Lelon's AEC-Q200 qualified series and ensure proper derating for reliable operation.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for Lelon capacitors?
faqs.answer: Lelon capacitors typically have shorter lead times compared to Japanese manufacturers. Standard products usually have 4-6 weeks lead time from Taiwan. Popular series are often available from local stock at BeiLuo Electronics for immediate delivery. For high-volume orders, Lelon can offer scheduled delivery programs to support just-in-time manufacturing requirements. The company's manufacturing flexibility allows for faster response to demand changes.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to discuss your delivery requirements and explore stock availability for your specific part numbers.

faqs.question: Does Lelon offer competitive pricing compared to other brands?
faqs.answer: Yes, Lelon capacitors are generally priced competitively compared to Japanese and European brands, often offering 20-30% cost savings while maintaining good quality levels. This cost advantage comes from efficient manufacturing operations in Taiwan and China, without compromising on quality control. For high-volume applications, Lelon's pricing can provide significant total cost savings while delivering reliable performance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team for competitive quotations on Lelon capacitors. We can provide price comparisons with other brands to help with your sourcing decision.

faqs.question: What certifications does Lelon hold?
faqs.answer: Lelon holds multiple international certifications including ISO 9001 for Quality Management Systems, ISO 14001 for Environmental Management, and IATF 16949 for Automotive Quality Management. The company's capacitors are also AEC-Q200 qualified for automotive applications and comply with RoHS and REACH environmental regulations. These certifications demonstrate Lelon's commitment to quality and environmental responsibility.
faqs.decisionGuide: For applications requiring certified quality systems, Lelon's comprehensive certifications provide assurance. Contact us for certification documentation.
